---
applyTo: "external-network/**,fundraising/plans/market-feedback-and-loi-plan.md"
description: "Use when working on external network contacts, contact interviews, outreach prep, meeting notes, follow-up planning, or relationship-context updates."
---

When work concerns an external network contact, follow `external-network/plans/contact-documentation-workflow.md`.

Default expectation:

- update or create the per-contact note under `external-network/network-contacts/<Contact>/` when new durable signal appears
- update `external-network/plans/current-network-action-sheet.md` when the next move, status, or signal changed
- update `external-network/network-contacts/current-network.md` only if relationship context changed
- update `fundraising/plans/market-feedback-and-loi-plan.md` only if the learning changed the broader thesis or cluster framing

Relationship-stage rule:

- treat `external-network/plans/current-network-action-sheet.md` as the single source of truth for next move and status
- keep per-contact notes focused on context, signal, and constraints; do not duplicate or drift the operational next-step state there
- never copy a prospect-specific signal into another prospect note without explicit source attribution and verification

Preserve direct operator language when it sharpens the market thesis.

Do not inflate pain or invent urgency that the contact did not express.
